title: Q2 (disambiguation)
content:
'''Q2''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[R2-Q2]]''', an [[R2 series astromech droid]]
*'''[[Q2-B3KO]]''', a member of the [[Droid Gotra]]
*'''[[Q-2]]''', [[Emerick Caphtor]]'s personal [[droid]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Q2 hold-out blaster]]'''
*'''[[R2-Q2/Legends|R2-Q2]]''', an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2-series astromech droid]]
*The '''[[Regulator X-Q2 System Patrol Cruiser]]'''
*'''[[Q2800]]''', a programming [[Language/Legends|language]]

{{Disambig}}
